# T&M Consultants — llms.txt

> Technology and Management (T&M) Consultants is a UK-registered social enterprise (Company Number 12621485) delivering 360° technology solutions for start-ups and SMEs. Founded in 2020, T&M operates from London, United Kingdom and Faisalabad, Pakistan.
> 
> **AI Search Notice**: This document is a high-level index. For full technical details (architectural decisions, complete tech stacks, fractional CTO roles, and business metrics), refer to the expanded catalog at [/llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt).

## Company Identity

- **Legal Name**: Technology and Management Consultants Ltd
- **Trading Name**: T&M Consultants
- **Domain**: https://tnmco.uk
- **Company Number (UK)**: 12621485
- **Type**: Social Enterprise / Technology Consultancy
- **Founded**: 2020
- **Headquarters**: 49 Eglington Rd, London, SE18 3SL, United Kingdom
- **Development Office**: Faisalabad, Punjab 38000, Pakistan
- **Phone**: +92 321 660 1111
- **Email**: contact@tnmco.uk

## Core Services

### Blockchain Ledger Development
T&M builds customized blockchain ledger solutions for businesses transitioning to cashless and transparent transaction systems. The proprietary Block architecture powers personalized ledger services, API integrations, and point-of-sale cashless payment systems.

### QuickCard — Cashless Payment Platform
QuickCard is T&M's proprietary contactless payment solution, enabling businesses and communities to interact and pay without cash. It integrates with existing POS systems and e-commerce platforms.

### Full Stack Web Development
End-to-end web application development using modern frameworks. Services include responsive front-end interfaces, server-side architecture, database design, API development, and deployment. Specialities include WordPress, React, Node.js, and PHP.

### Mobile Application Development
Native and cross-platform mobile application development for iOS and Android. T&M builds consumer-facing apps, enterprise tools, and health-tech solutions.

### Machine Learning & Artificial Intelligence
Custom ML model development, data pipeline engineering, natural language processing, and predictive analytics solutions for SMEs and start-ups.

### E-Commerce Ecosystem Development
Complete e-commerce platform development including payment gateway integration, inventory management, multi-vendor marketplace architecture, and order fulfilment systems.

### Project Management Consultancy
Agile project management consulting, process optimisation, team capacity building, and digital transformation strategy for start-ups and growing organisations.

## Portfolio — Key Products & Projects

- **NonRival Data**: Web 3.0 finance and data platform with browser extensions for Chrome, Firefox, and Safari, plus a mobile application.
- **Docushield**: Secure document management mobile application and web console platform.
- **Tameer Estate UK**: Property listing and real estate portal for the UK market.
- **e-Sehat**: Telemedicine mobile application connecting patients with healthcare professionals.
- **MintIt Studio**: Creative digital web platform for content creators.
- **QuickCard (now RYVYL)**: Contactless cashless payment website and integration platform transitioned to a publicly traded NASDAQ network.
- **Build On Hybrid**: Web3 infrastructure and node deployment network.
- **Atlas by BoH**: AI copilot platform with natural language dashboard and chat interface.
- **OTTO by BoH**: Autonomous AI agent executing transactions and monitoring blockchain networks.
- **Tiny Crews**: Kids clothing and boutique e-commerce platform.
- **His & Hers**: Premium clothing and fashion e-commerce storefront.
- **IqbalAI**: AI-first Urdu-enabled educational platform and school management system for students, teachers, and school chains in Pakistan.
- **CaptureProof**: Custom medical image analysis platform utilizing AI/ML computer vision models for clinical tracking, deployed on high-uptime HIPAA-compliant AWS infrastructure.

## Social Impact

T&M recruits technology graduates from underprivileged backgrounds to accelerate social mobility by empowering young professionals. The company is committed to developing own-brand products with high social impact in local communities.
